info.description: Plataforma de assinaturas de serviços - Gerenciamento de planos, assinantes e pagamentos
info.title: Minha Assinatura API

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns JWT token
Record a new payment for a subscription

get.description: Get a specific payment by ID
Get all plans for authenticated user. Each plan's image field contains base64-encoded binary data or is omitted if no image is set.

200.description: List of plans. Each plan's image field contains base64-encoded binary data or is omitted if no image.

post.description: Create a new billing plan. Images should be sent as base64-encoded strings.

parameters.description: Create Plan Request - image field should contain base64-encoded binary data (e.g., PNG, JPEG, WebP)
parameters.name: request

201.description: Plan created successfully. Image field in response contains base64-encoded binary data.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid base64 image format

get.description: Get a specific plan by ID. If the plan has an image, it will be returned as a base64-encoded string. To render the image in a web browser, use: (replace 'png' with actual format if needed).

200.description: Plan details. Image field contains base64-encoded binary data or omitted if no image.

put.description: Update plan details. To update the image, send it as a base64-encoded string in the 'image' field. Omit the 'image' field to keep the existing image unchanged. Pass empty string in 'image' to remove/clear the image.

parameters.description: Update Plan Request - 'image' field should contain base64-encoded binary data or be omitted to keep existing image
parameters.name: request

200.description: Plan updated. Image field in response contains base64-encoded binary data or omitted if no image.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid base64 image format

delete.description: Delete a plan. This will permanently delete the plan and any associated image data.

get.description: Get public store information by store_link. This endpoint returns basic store details.

Get all active plans from a store by store_link. Each plan's image field contains base64-encoded binary data (PNG, JPEG, WebP, etc.) or is omitted if no image is set. To render images in a web browser, use: (replace 'png' with actual format if needed).

200.description: Store plans with images. Each plan's 'image' field contains base64-encoded binary data or is omitted if no image.

get.description: Get all subscribers for authenticated user
Get a specific subscriber by ID
Get all active subscriptions for authenticated user

post.description: Create a new subscription for a subscriber to a plan

get.description: Get a specific subscription by ID
Get all payments for a subscription
Get all users with optional name filter
Get a specific user by ID

image.description: base64 encoded image data, null to keep existing
